package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceTestsImportGin() string {
    ruleID := "service_tests_import_gin"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Service-level tests that depend on Gin when the service contract is supposed to be transport-neutral."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
